zh.lifeSummary: 當Roger-Bernard Ier de Foix於1130年出生在法國米迪-列內斯阿利艾福瓦時，他的父親Roger III de Foix41歲，母親Jimena Berenguer de Barcelona25歲。他於1151年7月11日與Cécile Ferrane de Béziers在法國結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他於1185年被列為gouverneur de provence。他去世於1188年在他的家鄉享年58歲，埋葬在法國米迪-列內斯豪-加洛希特加貝勒。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Roger-Bernard Ier de Foix于1130年出生在法国米迪-列內斯阿利艾福瓦时，他的父亲Roger III de Foix41岁，母亲Jimena Berenguer de Barcelona25岁。他于1151年7月11日与Cécile Ferrane de Béziers在法国结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他于1185年被列为gouverneur de provence。他去世于1188年在他的家乡享年58岁，埋葬在法国米迪-列內斯豪-加洛希特加貝勒。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Foix
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Fox
meanings: English: nickname from a word denoting the animal (Middle English, Old English fox), widely used to denote a sly or cunning individual. It was also used for someone with red hair. In England this surname absorbed some early examples of surnames derived from the ancient Germanic personal names mentioned at Faulks and Foulks .
Irish: part translation of Gaelic Mac an tSionnaigh ‘son of the fox’ (see Tinney ).
Irish: also adopted for Ó Catharnaigh, see Kearney .

nameMeanings.name: Ier
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: and Norwegian vernacular form of   Peter .

variants.name: Peter
meanings: form of the name of the best-known of all Christ's apostles, traditionally regarded as the founder of the Christian Church. The name derives, via Latin, from Greek petros ‘stone, rock’. This is used as a translation of the Aramaic byname Cephas, given to the apostle Simon son of Jona, to distinguish him from another of the same name ( Simon Zelotes ). ‘When Jesus beheld him, he said, Thou art Simon the son of Jona: thou shalt be called Cephas, which is by interpretation, A stone’ (John 1:42). According to Matthew 16:17–18, Christ says more explicitly, ‘Blessed art thou, Simon Bar-jona … thou art Peter, and upon this rock I will build my church’. The name has been in continuous use since the Middle Ages.

en.lifeSummary: When Roger-Bernard Ier de Foix was born in 1130, in Foix, Ariège, Midi-Pyrénées, France, his father, Roger III de Foix, was 41 and his mother, Jimena Berenguer de Barcelona, was 25. He married Cécile Ferrane de Béziers on 11 July 1151, in France. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 3 daughters. In 1185, at the age of 55, his occupation is listed as gouverneur de provence. He died in 1188, in his hometown, at the age of 58, and was buried in Cintegabelle, Haute-Garonne, Midi-Pyrénées, France.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Roger-Bernard Ier de Foix est né en 1130, à Foix, Ariège, Midi-Pyrénées, France, son père, Roger III de Foix, avait 41 ans et sa mère, Jimena Berenguer de Barcelona, avait 25 ans. Il a épousé Cécile Ferrane de Béziers le 11 juillet 1151, à France. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 3 filles. En 1185, à l’âge de 55 ans, sa profession de son indiquée est gouverneur de provence. Il est décédé en 1188, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 58 ans, et a été enterré à Cintegabelle, Haute-Garonne, Midi-Pyrénées, France.

de.lifeSummary: Als Roger-Bernard Ier de Foix 1130 in Foix, Ariège, Midi-Pyrénées, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Roger III de Foix 41 und seine Mutter Jimena Berenguer de Barcelona 25. Er hat am 11. Juli 1151 in Frankreich Cécile Ferrane de Béziers geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 3 Töchter. 1185, als er 55 Jahre alt war, war sein Beruf als gouverneur de provence aufgeführt. Er starb 1188 im Alter von 58 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Cintegabelle, Haute-Garonne, Midi-Pyrénées, Frankreich begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Roger-Bernard Ier de Foix è nato il nel 1130 nel Foix, Ariège, Midi-Pyrénées, Francia, il suo padre, Roger III de Foix, aveva 41 anni e il suo madre, Jimena Berenguer de Barcelona, aveva 25 anni. Lui sposato Cécile Ferrane de Béziers il 11 luglio 1151, nel Francia. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 3 figlie. Nel 1185, all'età di 55 anni, la sua occupazione è indicata come gouverneur de provence. Morì nel 1188, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 58 anni, e fu sepolto a Cintegabelle, Haute-Garonne, Midi-Pyrénées, Francia.

ja.lifeSummary: Roger-Bernard Ier de Foixが1130年にフランスミディ-プイルeンeスアリeッジフォイックスで生まれた時，父Roger III de Foixは41歳，母Jimena Berenguer de Barcelonaは25歳であった。1151年7月11日にフランスでCécile Ferrane de Béziersと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。1185年，55歳の時，職業はgouverneur de provenceと記録されている。彼は1188年に故郷で58歳で死去し，フランスミディ-プイルeンeスハウテ-ガーオンシンテガベルにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Roger-Bernard Ier de Foix(이)가 1130년 프랑스 미디-p이ee스 애리e지 포이스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Roger III de Foix(은)는 41세였고, 그의 어머니 Jimena Berenguer de Barcelona(은)는 25세였다. 그는 1151년 7월 11일 프랑스에서 Cécile Ferrane de Béziers(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 1185년, 55세의 나이로 그의 직업은 gouverneur de provence이었다. 그는 1188년 그의 고향에서 58세의 나이로 사망했으며 프랑스 미디-p이ee스 하테-가니 신테가벨에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Roger-Bernard Ier de Foix nasceu em 1130, em Foix, Ariège, Midi-Pyrénées, França, seu pai, Roger III de Foix, tinha 41 anos e sua mãe, Jimena Berenguer de Barcelona, tinha 25 anos. Ele casou-se com Cécile Ferrane de Béziers em 11 de julho de 1151, em França. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 3 filhas. Em 1185, com 55 anos, sua profissão aparece como gouverneur de provence. Ele faleceu em 1188, em sua cidade natal, com 58 anos, e foi sepultado em Cintegabelle, Haute-Garonne, Midi-Pyrénées, França.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Roger-Bernard Ier de Foix родился в 1130 г. в местности фоикс, ариeдж, миди-пирeнeесь, Франция, его отцу по имени Roger III de Foix было 41 год, а матери, которую звали Jimena Berenguer de Barcelona, 25. Он женился на женщине по имени Cécile Ferrane de Béziers 11 июля 1151 г. в местности Франция. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 3 дочери. В 1185 году, в возрасте 55 лет,  он работал по профессии gouverneur de provence. Он умер в 1188 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 58 лет и был похоронен в местности синтегабелл, хауте-гаронн, миди-пирeнeесь, Франция.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Roger-Bernard Ier de Foix nació en 1130, en Foix, Ariège, Mediodía-Pirineos, Francia, su papá, Roger III de Foix, tenía 41 años y su mamá, Jimena Berenguer de Barcelona, tenía 25 años. Se casó con Cécile Ferrane de Béziers el 11 de julio de 1151, en Francia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 3 hijas. En 1185, a la edad de 55 años, su ocupación registrada era gouverneur de provence. Murió en 1188, en su pueblo, a la edad de 58 años, y fue sepultado en Cintegabelle, Haute-Garonne, Mediodía-Pirineos, Francia.
